name: GAS STATION W SNOW
description: Gas station at night in the snow — moody cinematic, neon reflections, cold weather fashion.
asset_requirements: Upload TWO images: (1) your top/jacket, (2) your pants. Cinematic full outfit shot in a snowy gas station scene.

input_manifest.label: Top (Hoodie / Jacket / Shirt)
input_manifest.hint: Top half of the outfit — hoodie, jacket, or shirt. Clean background preferred.

input_manifest.label: Pants / Bottoms
input_manifest.hint: Bottom half — pants or shorts. Clean background preferred.

steps.prompt: Cinematic fashion photography at a snowy gas station at night. A model wearing a full outfit — jacket/top and pants shown together — standing under harsh fluorescent gas station lights with snow falling around them. Cinematic color grade, cold atmosphere, streetwear energy. The full outfit is crisp and detailed in the dramatic lighting.

Gas station snow cinematic video. Model wearing the clothing walks slowly through heavy snowfall under a gas station canopy, snow blowing around them, neon reflections on the ground, breath visible, the clothing moves naturally in the wind, moody cinematic camera movement.
